name: Cqrs.Command

unions.name: CommandResponse
unions.comment: Represents the possible states of a command.

aliases.name: CommandError
aliases.comment: Represents the default inner data type of a `Failed` variant.

aliases.name: Response
aliases.comment: Represents the response state of a command.

aliases.name: StandardRequestConfig
aliases.comment: Configuration for requests resulting in a `Cmd`
aliases.type: { headers : List.List Http.Header, timeout : Maybe.Maybe Basics.Float, tracker : Maybe.Maybe String.String, risky : Basics.Bool }

aliases.name: TaskRequestConfig
aliases.comment: Configuration for requests resulting in a `Task`
aliases.type: { headers : List.List Http.Header, timeout : Maybe.Maybe Basics.Float, risky : Basics.Bool }

values.name: decoder
values.comment: Decodes a given payload into a `Cqrs.Command.Response`.

values.name: fail
values.comment:
Constructs the `Failed` variant of a `Cqrs.Command.Response`.

This is useful for testing how your UI will respond to the sad path, without actually sending a command.

values.name: failed
values.comment:
Checks if a given `Cqrs.Command.Response` is a `Failed` variant.

    failed Succeeded --> False

    failed (Failed "reason") --> True

values.name: map
values.comment: Maps the `Succeeded` variant of a given `Cqrs.Command.Response`
values.type: (a -> b) -> Cqrs.Command.CommandResponse e a -> Cqrs.Command.CommandResponse e b

values.name: mapError
values.comment: Maps the `Failed` variant of a given `Cqrs.Command.Response`.
values.type: (e -> f) -> Cqrs.Command.CommandResponse e a -> Cqrs.Command.CommandResponse f a

values.name: reason
values.comment:
If a given `Cqrs.Command.Response` was unsuccessful, the reason for the failure will be returned.

    reason Succeeded --> Nothing

    reason (Failed "reason") --> Just "reason"

values.name: request
values.comment: Sends a command to the given URL with the provided body and returns a parsed `Cqrs.Command.Response` in turn.
values.type: String.String -> Maybe.Maybe (Http.Error -> Cqrs.Command.CommandError) -> Json.Encode.Value -> (Cqrs.Command.Response -> msg) -> Platform.Cmd.Cmd msg

values.name: requestTask
values.comment:
Sends a command to the given URL and returns a `Task` containing the parsed `Cqrs.Command.Response`.
The value contained within the `Cqrs.Command.Response`, will be the value parsed via the provided decoder.
values.type: String.String -> Maybe.Maybe (Http.Error -> Cqrs.Command.CommandError) -> Json.Encode.Value -> Task.Task () Cqrs.Command.Response

values.name: requestTaskWithConfig
values.comment: Similar to `requestTask` but a `TaskRequestConfig` can be passed in for cases where customisation of the request headers, etc are desired.
values.type: Cqrs.Command.TaskRequestConfig -> String.String -> Maybe.Maybe (Http.Error -> Cqrs.Command.CommandError) -> Json.Encode.Value -> Task.Task () Cqrs.Command.Response

values.name: requestWithConfig
values.comment: Similar to `request` but a `StandardRequestConfig` can be passed in for cases where customisation of the request headers, etc are desired.
values.type: Cqrs.Command.StandardRequestConfig -> String.String -> Maybe.Maybe (Http.Error -> Cqrs.Command.CommandError) -> Json.Encode.Value -> (Cqrs.Command.Response -> msg) -> Platform.Cmd.Cmd msg

values.name: succeed
values.comment:
Constructs the `Succeeded` variant of a `Cqrs.Command.Response`.

This is useful for testing how your UI will respond to the happy path, without actually sending a command.

values.name: succeeded
values.comment:
Checks if a given `Cqrs.Command.Response` is a `Succeeded` variant.

    succeeded Succeeded --> True

    succeeded (Failed "reason") --> False

values.name: unwrap
values.comment: Unwraps a homogeneous `Cqrs.Command.Response` to its' inner value from the given variant.

values.name: withDefault
values.comment: Provides a default case for a `Cqrs.Command.Response` where the `Succeeded` variant is in the default `()` state.

name: Cqrs.Query

unions.name: QueryResponse
unions.comment: Represents the possible states of a query.

aliases.name: QueryError
aliases.comment: Represents the default inner data type of an `Error` variant.

aliases.name: Response
aliases.comment: Represents the response state of a query.

aliases.name: StandardRequestConfig
aliases.comment: Configuration for requests resulting in a `Cmd`
aliases.type: { headers : List.List Http.Header, timeout : Maybe.Maybe Basics.Float, tracker : Maybe.Maybe String.String, risky : Basics.Bool }

aliases.name: TaskRequestConfig
aliases.comment: Configuration for requests resulting in a `Task`
aliases.type: { headers : List.List Http.Header, timeout : Maybe.Maybe Basics.Float, risky : Basics.Bool }

values.name: data
values.comment:
If a given `Cqrs.Query.Response` was successful, the data it contains will be returned.

    data (Data []) --> Just []

    data (Error "reason") --> Nothing

values.name: decoder
values.comment: Decodes a given payload into a `Cqrs.Query.Response a`.

values.name: fail
values.comment:
Constructs the `Error` variant of a `Cqrs.Query.Response a`.

This is useful for testing how your UI will respond to the sad path, without actually sending a query.

values.name: failed
values.comment:
Checks if a given `Cqrs.Query.Response` is an `Error` variant.

    failed (Data []) --> False

    failed (Error "reason") --> True

values.name: map
values.comment: Maps the `Data` variant of a given `Cqrs.Query.Response a` and returns a `Cqrs.Query.Response b`.
values.type: (a -> b) -> Cqrs.Query.QueryResponse e a -> Cqrs.Query.QueryResponse e b

values.name: mapError
values.comment: Maps the `Error` variant of a given `Cqrs.Query.Response a`.
values.type: (e -> f) -> Cqrs.Query.QueryResponse e a -> Cqrs.Query.QueryResponse f a

values.name: reason
values.comment:
If a given `Cqrs.Query.Response` was unsuccessful, the reason for the failure will be returned.

    reason (Data []) --> Nothing

    reason (Error "reason") --> Just "reason"

values.name: request
values.comment:
Sends a query to the given URL and returns a `Cmd` for the given `msg` containing the parsed `Cqrs.Query.Response a`.
The value contained within the `Cqrs.Query.Response a`, will be the value parsed via the provided decoder.
values.type: String.String -> Maybe.Maybe (Http.Error -> String.String) -> (Cqrs.Query.Response a -> msg) -> Json.Decode.Decoder a -> Platform.Cmd.Cmd msg

values.name: requestTask
values.comment:
Sends a query to the given URL and returns a `Task` which will contain the parsed `Cqrs.Query.Response a`.
The value contained within the `Cqrs.Query.Response a`, will be the value parsed via the provided decoder.
values.type: String.String -> Maybe.Maybe (Http.Error -> String.String) -> Json.Decode.Decoder a -> Task.Task () (Cqrs.Query.Response a)

values.name: requestTaskWithConfig
values.comment: Similar to `requestTask` but a `TaskRequestConfig` can be passed in for cases where customisation of the request headers, etc are desired.
values.type: Cqrs.Query.TaskRequestConfig -> String.String -> Maybe.Maybe (Http.Error -> String.String) -> Json.Decode.Decoder a -> Task.Task () (Cqrs.Query.Response a)

values.name: requestWithConfig
values.comment: Similar to `request` but a `StandardRequestConfig` can be passed in for cases where customisation of the request headers, etc are desired.
values.type: Cqrs.Query.StandardRequestConfig -> String.String -> Maybe.Maybe (Http.Error -> String.String) -> (Cqrs.Query.Response a -> msg) -> Json.Decode.Decoder a -> Platform.Cmd.Cmd msg

values.name: succeed
values.comment:
Constructs the `Data` variant of a `Cqrs.Query.Response a`.

This is useful for testing how your UI will respond to the happy path, without actually sending a query.

values.name: succeeded
values.comment:
Checks if a given `Cqrs.Query.Response` is a `Data` variant.

    succeeded (Data []) --> True

    succeeded (Error "reason") --> False

values.name: withDefault
values.comment: Provides a default case for a `Cqrs.Query.Response` in place of the value held within the `Error` variant.
